archetype: Indian Vibrant Earth (Hybrid of Organic & Vibrant Play)

buttons.primary_whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white font-bold rounded-full hover:bg-[#21B858] transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-[1.02] shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl shadow-[#25D366]/30 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-8 py-4 text-lg
buttons.secondary_saffron: bg-[#FF7235] text-white font-bold rounded-full hover:bg-[#FF8A55] transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg shadow-[#FF7235]/30 px-8 py-4
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#0F3818] text-[#0F3818] rounded-full hover:bg-[#0F3818] hover:text-[#FBF9F6] transition-colors px-6 py-3

cards.testimonial: bg-white p-8 rounded-3xl shadow-sm border border-[#0F3818]/5 relative overflow-hidden
cards.benefit: bg-[#F3EFE9] p-8 rounded-3xl border border-[#0F3818]/10 flex flex-col items-start gap-4
cards.pricing: bg-white p-8 rounded-3xl border-2 border-[#0F3818]/10 relative
cards.pricing_highlighted: bg-[#0F3818] text-white p-8 rounded-3xl shadow-2xl relative border-2 border-[#FF7235]

inputs.style: bg-white border-2 border-[#0F3818]/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-lg focus:border-[#FF7235] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF7235]/20 transition-all outline-none

motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion. Staggered fade-up (`y: 20`, `opacity: 0`) for lists and bento grid items. Duration 0.5s, ease 'easeOut'.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons must scale up 1.02x. Cards should have a subtle Y-translate (`-translate-y-1`) and increased shadow on hover.

textures.noise: Apply a subtle CSS grain overlay (e.g., `bg-[url('data:image/svg+xml,...')]`) on the #FBF9F6 background to prevent digital flatness.

hero_fitness.description: Muscular man working out. Use in the hero section, potentially with a strong #0F3818 gradient overlay to ensure text contrast.

solution_food.description: Indian thali. Use for the 'Customized Indian Diet' solution bento box. Object-fit cover with slight zoom on hover.

workout_feature.description: Strong man chest workout. Use for 'Simple Workouts' bento box.

testimonial_1.description: Joyful Indian woman portrait. Use as avatar for female testimonial.

testimonial_2.description: Smiling Indian man portrait. Use as avatar for male testimonial.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text over #0F3818 meets APCA standards. Provide high contrast focus rings.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements must use data-testid (e.g., data-testid='whatsapp-cta', data-testid='lead-form-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a hybrid app (Marketing Funnel + Admin Dashboard). Ensure the marketing pages do not look like a SaaS dashboard.
For the marketing pages (Landing, Pricing, Thank You), DO NOT use standard Shadcn Cards or generic layouts. Use custom pure HTML/Tailwind to build the bento grids and asymmetric layouts.
For the Admin Dashboard (/admin), DO use Shadcn components (Table, Input, Button) in a strict, dense layout.
The /funnel page should visually map the 6-message sequence. Use a timeline or connecting lines (SVG or border-l) to connect message cards.
Always wrap interactive elements in 'framer-motion' for fluid entry.
Hero CTA MUST be the WhatsApp Green button. Use the #FF7235 Saffron for secondary actions or highlighting important checkmarks.
Do NOT use placeholder text for images. Use the exact URLs provided in this file.
Implement the sticky header correctly with z-50 and a backdrop-blur.
